reviews.review_description: It's pretty good but the first thing I you should make it work like you can go in games and it stays in your boundary area but too far away from you can't see it until you get closer to it it so you then you can see it and when you be playing games and you won't be able to see it until you get closer to where you left it then it  and then you can control it in the game that you are playing instead of your menu button change the music or song the other thing that might make this cool is instead of tapping the song on the menu when you click the menu you have these objects so you can pick up and put it in an area that starts playing the song that you picked up and put in that area I feel like that will make it really cool but it's a pretty good I would like to see if it gets better in the future cuz it's pretty solid it's seems simple to use
There is almost nothing to do in this app.
